main.description: Get the authenticated user's notification settings. User-authenticated.

pendingRoute.description: Where permission-request alerts go: a '+'-joined token set (push|telegram|email|dm|webhook, optionally channel:<id>) or 'off'.

autoAllow.description: Policy for incoming permission requests: auto-grant all, only trusted apps, or none.

pushDevices.description: Number of web push subscriptions registered for this account.
